scenes.visual_note: Mira owl appears slowly, gentle warm glow, unhurried entrance
scenes.subtitle_text: Take a breath. We'll go at your pace.
scenes.voice_text: If you've just been diagnosed, everything might feel overwhelming right now. That's completely normal. GluMira is here to help — one step at a time.

scenes.visual_note: A single gentle insulin curve draws itself very slowly
scenes.subtitle_text: Insulin works on a timeline. GluMira shows you when.
scenes.voice_text: Insulin doesn't work instantly — it rises, peaks, and fades. This curve shows you exactly when it's doing its job, so you're never guessing.

scenes.visual_note: The quiet tail of long-acting insulin pulses gently with soft blue light
scenes.subtitle_text: Even long-acting insulin has a rhythm you can learn.
scenes.voice_text: Long-acting insulin works quietly in the background. GluMira tracks its gentle tail so you can see the full picture — not just the peaks.

scenes.visual_note: A protective shield envelops the data, soft amber edges pulse
scenes.subtitle_text: Safety alerts are always on. You're not alone in this.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira watches for overlap, stacking risks, and unusual patterns. If something needs your attention, you'll know — gently, clearly.

scenes.visual_note: A clean report slides in, highlighting key metrics
scenes.subtitle_text: Bring confidence to your next clinic visit.
scenes.voice_text: Before your next appointment, generate a clear report your care team can understand instantly. No prep needed — just tap and share.

scenes.visual_note: Warm confetti, soft teal badge, gentle completion
scenes.subtitle_text: You've got this. And we've got you.
scenes.voice_text: That's everything for now. Remember — every expert was once a beginner. GluMira will be right here, whenever you need it.
